# Valid IBANs
NL91 ABNA 0417 1643 00
DE89 3704 0044 0532 0130 00
GB82 WEST 1234 5698 7654 32
FR14 2004 1010 0505 0001 3M02 606
ES91 2100 0418 4502 0005 1332
PL61 1090 1014 0000 0712 1981 2874
IT60 X054 2811 1010 0000 0123 456

# Invalid IBANs - Too short
NL91 ABNA 0417 1643
DE89 3704 0044 0532 0130
GB82 WEST 1234 5698 7654
FR14 2004 1010 0505 0001 3M02

# Invalid IBANs - Invalid country code
XX99 1234 5678 9012 3456
ZZ99 1234 5678 9012 3456

# Invalid IBANs - Invalid check digits
NL91 ABNA 0417 1643 01
DE89 3704 0044 0532 0131 00
GB82 WEST 1234 5698 7654 33

# Invalid IBANs - Edge cases
NL00 ABNA 0417 1643 00
DE99 3704 0044 0532 0130 00
GB82 W3ST 1234 5698 7654 32
FR14 2004 1010 0505 0001 3M0Z 606

# Invalid IBANs - Invalid characters
NL91 ABNA 0417 1643 0A
DE89 3704 0044 0532 0130 @0
GB82 WEST 1234 5698 7654 #2
